name: lcsc-api-endpoints
description: LCSC API: search via POST to /search/v2/global with {keyword: term}; detail via GET /product/detail?productCode=CODE. Both require browser-like User-Agent and Cookie: currencyCode=EUR. No auth needed.

content: When InvenTree is not installed, use distinct fallback classes (_FallbackBase, _FallbackMixin) instead of assigning both to object. Python 3 raises TypeError: duplicate base class object when the same class appears twice in MRO.
